title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at SEBI

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at SEBI
jsonLd.description:
We at SEBI are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SEBI:
SEBI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SEBI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
